title: Nature Paper: Systems-Level Evidence for the Information Theory of Aging
summary: Gladyshev lab analyzed ~11,000 cellular gene expression profiles, finding aging involves coordinated, partially reversible epigenetic changes. Introduced transcriptomic clocks outperforming chronological age.

title: Nasal EV Therapy Reverses Brain Aging in Mice
summary: Texas A&M: microRNA-loaded extracellular vesicles delivered nasally reduced neuroinflammation and restored memory in aged mice. Published in Journal of Extracellular Vesicles.

title: APOE2 Longevity Gene Enhances Neuronal DNA Repair
summary: The protective APOE2 variant improves neuronal DNA repair and confers resistance to cellular senescence. Adding APOE2 protein to APOE4 neurons reduced damage.

title: Retro Biosciences Hits $1.8B Valuation, Phase 1 Alzheimer's Trial Progressing
summary: Sam Altman-backed Retro Biosciences reached $1.8B valuation. Phase 1 Alzheimer's trial shows good safety; data expected August 2026.

title: Daewoong Pharma Acquires Turn Bio's Epigenetic Reprogramming Platform
summary: Korean pharma Daewoong acquired Turn Bio's reprogramming technology for aging-related disease R&D. Signals big pharma conviction in epigenetic reprogramming.
